311.title: Voice of a Killer
311.description: Jennifer Pan witnessed the murder of her mother and the attempted murder of her father. But when he wakes from a coma, her father has a very different story to tell.

312.title: Judge Judy
312.description: Accused of having a gambling problem, a young student is sued by a former friend for an unpaid loan to buy school books. Co-workers fight over the purchase of an allegedly faulty treadmill.

313.title: Cheaters
313.description: Andrew discovers his girlfriend has set her sights on a married man.

314.title: World's Most Evil Killers
314.description: A look at the life and crimes of David Richard Berkowitz, also known as the Son of Sam, an American serial killer who pleaded guilty to eight separate shooting attacks that began in New York City during the summer of 1976.

315.title: Judge Judy
315.description: A woman wants her ex to repay loans. Then, a surveillance video lends credibility to a plaintiff's claim that a janitor stole her diamond ring.

316.title: Judge Judy
316.description: A man's brother sues him for attorney fees. Then, a woman wants her ex to repay a loan.

317.title: Judge Judy
317.description: An ex-lover accuses a woman of damaging belongings by leaving them out in the rain. Then, a woman wants her ex to repay loans.

318.title: Something's Killing Me
318.description: Thomas Rybinski was treated for suspected meningitis, but his condition worsened. When other patients began to have the same symptoms, doctors had to act fast to save lives.

319.title: Operation Repo
319.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

320.title: Operation Repo
320.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

321.title: Judge Judy
321.description: A woman says her ex owes her for an engagement ring, his share of a cruise, and a loan. Then, a plaintiff sues a man for crashing her car, making unauthorised charges on her card and ruining her credit.

322.title: Judge Judy
322.description: Dueling restraining orders, a stolen car and accusations of slander come into play when a couple break up. Then, a defendant insists that his ex-fiancee's sister never lent him $5,000.

323.title: Motorbike Cops
323.description: Join Britain's traffic cops on their daily jobs and get an inside look into what goes into policing the country's roads.

324.title: Motorbike Cops
324.description: Join Britain's traffic cops on their daily jobs and get an inside look into what goes into policing the country's roads.

325.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
325.description: They say, `you can't teach an old dog new tricks', but nobody has said anything about being unable to teach a bounty-hunting Dog new tricks. Which is good because after an eight-season run on A&E, Duane `Dog' Chapman brings his people-tracking skills to a new network, along with wife Beth and their son, Leland. But this time the Chapmans aren't searching for fugitives on their home turf of Hawaii. Instead, they travel to a different city each week and work with the local bondsman offices and bounty hunters, using their years of experience in the business to assist the local agents. The Chapmans motivate and inspire the local bounty hunters while training them how to use high-tech tracking devices and showing them new techniques they can use in finding fugitives.

326.title: Close Calls On Camera
326.description: A woman is trapped in her loft conversion bedroom while a fire rages below her, and a young boy falls from a promenade while chasing after his dog, so rescuers must race against the incoming tide.

330.description: An ex-girlfriend sues a man reportedly receiving $10,000 a month in a casino settlement, teen parents' grandmothers feud over a crib, a baby shower and being left out of the delivery room.

331.title: Judge Judy
331.description: A teen sues for baby-sitting fees, a man sues his former friend for repayment of a loan.

332.title: Judge Judy

353.description: The case of a young woman who follows her dream by moving to Las Vegas to become a showgirl, but her dreams turn into a grisly nightmare.
